title: Phase README
description: Validates the structure of a phase README.md inside .context/plans/plan-<slug>/phases/phase-NN-<slug>/README.md.

content.description: Full text content of the phase README.md file.

allOf.description: Must have a top-level H1 matching '# Phase NN — <title>' (zero-padded number)
Gate section must contain at least one checklist item '- [ ]'
